allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\MINA_v2" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Content "c:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\MINA_v2\\mina_bot.log" -Encoding UTF8 | Where-Object { $_ -match "TP1|TP2|TRAILING|SAVUNMA|STOP LOSS|POSITION_CLOSED|rate limit|-1003|-1106|KRITIK" } | Select-Object -Last 60)
PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "name='python.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, @{N='RAM_MB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSetSize/1MB,1\)}}, CreationDate | Format-Table)
